meaning: n.扫除,垃圾adj.扫荡的,彻底的,广泛的,规模大的
examples: Football mania is sweeping the country.
A flu epidemic is sweeping through Moscow.
The European Parliament has voted for sweeping reforms of the controversial EU Common Fisheries Policy.
He brushed off Mikel's attempts to stop him before sweeping the ball past Cech.
